mapper.insert: insert into task_dependency (task_id, dependency_task_id, type) values (#{taskId}, #{dependencyTaskId}, #{type})
mapper.delete: delete from task_dependency where task_id = #{taskId} and dependency_task_id = #{dependencyTaskId}
mapper.select: select dependency_task_id from task_dependency where task_id = #{taskId}
select task_id from task_dependency where dependency_task_id = #{taskId}
select count(*) from task_dependency where task_id = #{taskId} or dependency_task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.delete: delete from task_dependency where task_id = #{taskId} or dependency_task_id = #{taskId}
